dataList.content: ผ่านแคนโต IX เพื่อปลดล็อก

<size=75%>ดูเนื้อเรื่องอีเวนต์ด่านแรก
เพื่อปลดล็อก</size>
อีเวนต์ปิดแล้ว
ตัวละครโบนัสอีเวนต์

During the event period, deploying the following Identities on your team will
boost the amount of <color=#5c53e7>[Severed Thread]</color> earned.
You can earn a maximum of <color=#5c53e7>120%</color> boost to the amount of event currency earned.
ไกด์สกุลเงินอีเวนต์

You can obtain <color=#5c53e7>[Severed Thread]</color> from first-time Event/Main Story Stages completions, or by clearing the Mirror Dungeon.
You also have a small chance to obtain <color=#5c53e7>[Severed and Scorched Skein]</color> in the process.

<color=#5c53e7>[Severed and Scorched Skein]</color> is immediately converted to 20 <color=#5c53e7>[Severed Thread]</color> upon acquisition.

Earn <color=#eeeeee>[Severed Thread]</color> via the following methods:
First-time Event Stage & Main Story Stage clears and Mirror Dungeon clears.

In the <color=#eeeeee>[แลกรางวัล]</color> window, you can purchase various rewards
by spending <color=#eeeeee>[Severed Thread]</color> you have collected.
ไอเทมที่มี
